description: 停止尝试。后接名词或动名词。
examples_json: [{"en":"Don't give up on your dreams.","zh":"不要放弃你的梦想。"}]

description: 从睡眠中醒来。wake up + 时间。
examples_json: [{"en":"I wake up at 6 AM every day.","zh":"我每天早上6点醒来。"}]
[{"en":"Can you pick me up at the station?","zh":"你能到车站接我吗？"}]
[{"en":"Please clean up your room.","zh":"请把你的房间收拾干净。"}]
[{"en":"He didn't show up for the meeting.","zh":"他没有来开会。"}]
[{"en":"Please sit down and relax.","zh":"请坐下来放松。"}]

description: 从激动/愤怒中平静下来。
examples_json: [{"en":"Calm down and tell me what happened.","zh":"冷静下来告诉我发生了什么。"}]

description: 机器出故障或情绪崩溃。
examples_json: [{"en":"My car broke down on the highway.","zh":"我的车在高速上抛锚了。"}]
[{"en":"He turned down the job offer.","zh":"他拒绝了那份工作邀请。"}]
[{"en":"Write down your ideas.","zh":"把你的想法写下来。"}]

description: 通过查询或经历发现某事。
examples_json: [{"en":"I need to find out the truth.","zh":"我需要查明真相。"}]
[{"en":"I work out at the gym three times a week.","zh":"我每周去健身房锻炼三次。"}]
[{"en":"We've run out of milk.","zh":"我们牛奶喝完了。"}]
[{"en":"I can't figure out this problem.","zh":"我弄不明白这个问题。"}]
[{"en":"Check out this new website!","zh":"看看这个新网站！"}]
[{"en":"The plane took off at 3 PM.","zh":"飞机下午3点起飞了。"}]
[{"en":"Please turn off the lights.","zh":"请关灯。"}]
[{"en":"Don't put off your homework.","zh":"别拖延你的作业。"}]
[{"en":"He likes to show off his new car.","zh":"他喜欢炫耀他的新车。"}]

description: 还清债务或努力终有回报。
examples_json: [{"en":"Hard work always pays off.","zh":"努力工作总有回报。"}]
[{"en":"Put on your coat. It's cold.","zh":"穿上外套，天冷。"}]
[{"en":"Turn on the TV, please.","zh":"请打开电视。"}]

description: 上公交/火车/飞机或相处。
examples_json: [{"en":"They get on well with each other.","zh":"他们相处得很好。"}]
[{"en":"Carry on with your work.","zh":"继续你的工作。"}]
[{"en":"What's going on here?","zh":"这里发生了什么？"}]
[{"en":"Finally he gave in and agreed.","zh":"最后他让步同意了。"}]
[{"en":"Come over to my house tonight.","zh":"今晚来我家吧。"}]
[{"en":"I'll call you back later.","zh":"我稍后给你回电话。"}]
[{"en":"I'll get back to you soon.","zh":"我很快回复你。"}]
[{"en":"Let me think it over.","zh":"让我好好想想。"}]
[{"en":"I need to make a decision soon.","zh":"我需要尽快做决定。"}]
[{"en":"She takes care of her brother.","zh":"她照顾她的弟弟。"}]
[{"en":"Have a look at this photo.","zh":"看看这张照片。"}]
[{"en":"They do business with many countries.","zh":"他们和许多国家有生意往来。"}]
[{"en":"Get ready for the trip.","zh":"为旅行做好准备。"}]
[{"en":"Keep in touch after you move.","zh":"你搬家后保持联系。"}]
[{"en":"Her dream came true.","zh":"她的梦想实现了。"}]
[{"en":"They set up a new company.","zh":"他们成立了一家新公司。"}]
